'''Lumchugger's Hub''' was one of the most popular entertainment regions on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bescane/Legends|Bescane]]. The [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] [[Cooper's Swoopers]] operated here. It was a place where workers would spend their down time visiting [[Holotheater/Legends|holotheathers]], gladiator droid contests, [[Shockball/Legends|shock ball]] rooms, zero-g dancitoriums, [[cantina]]s, and gambling parlors. The [[Arcade Omicron]] was located in this hub.<ref name="DH" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|9|Death-Hunter}} {{1st}}
